title: approvals — settings
description: Tenant-scope approval-engine preferences that supplement template-level config. Two groups: tenant-wide reminder defaults + per-user 'my inbox' preferences.

groups.label: Approvals
groups.description: Tenant-wide approval-engine preferences. Governance defaults + delegation policy + reminder cadence.

sections.label: Governance defaults
sections.description: Applied when a template omits the field.

fields.name: default_expires_after_hours
fields.label: Default expiration (hours)
fields.helpText: Applied to templates that don't specify expires_after_hours. 168 = 7 days.

fields.name: default_on_timeout
fields.label: Default on-timeout behaviour
fields.helpText: Applied to templates that don't specify on_timeout. Auto-approve is discouraged — SOC 2 auditors treat it as a policy exception.

fields.name: refuse_self_approval_by_default
fields.label: Refuse self-approval by default
fields.helpText: When on, an approver_id matching the requester_id is refused unless the template's allows_self_approve=true. SOC 2 segregation-of-duties evidence.

sections.label: Reminder cadence
sections.description: How often approvers are nudged before expiration.

fields.name: default_reminder_intervals_hours
fields.label: Reminder cadence (comma-separated hours)
fields.helpText: Applied to templates that don't specify reminder_config. Each number = hours since request time (or last reminder) before the next reminder.

fields.name: delegation_substitution_enabled
fields.label: Substitute delegated approvers automatically
fields.helpText: When on, approvers who are OOF via a RoleDelegation are auto-replaced by their delegate in resolved_approvers. Turn off for tenants with strict delegated-approval controls (SOC 2 CC6.3 alt-path).

fields.name: digest_frequency
fields.label: Pending approvals digest
fields.helpText: In addition to real-time notifications, receive a periodic digest of your pending approvals.

fields.name: show_delegation_badge
fields.label: Show 'delegate' badge on delegated approvals
fields.helpText: When on, approvals you were substituted into via delegation show a badge on the row.
